// D009: a suppression-marker reason must be at least 10 chars after trimming.
class MarkerShortReason {
    // 9-char reason is too cheap: the marker is dead, the swallow still fires.
    void shortReasonFires() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001.*at least 10 characters"
            // no-report: too short
            log(e);
        }
    }

    // A 10-char reason meets the floor and suppresses.
    void tenCharSuppresses() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // no-report: cleanup ok
            log(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}

    void log(Exception e) {}
}
